item.text: I found only two consuming-crate candidates so far: `crates/orbit-cli/Cargo.toml` and `crates/orbit-tools/Cargo.toml`. Next I’ll confirm the exact section headers around each entry.

item.aggregated_output:
[package]
name = "orbit-tools"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
license.workspace = true

[dependencies]
chrono.workspace = true
orbit-exec = { path = "../orbit-exec" }
orbit-knowledge = { path = "../orbit-knowledge" }
orbit-policy = { path = "../orbit-policy" }
orbit-common = { path = "../orbit-common" }
regex.workspace = true
serde.workspace = true
serde_json.workspace = true
sha2.workspace = true
thiserror.workspace = true

[dev-dependencies]
rusqlite.workspace = true
tempfile = "3"

[package]
name = "orbit-cli"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
license.workspace = true

[[bin]]
name = "orbit"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
axum.workspace = true
chrono.workspace = true
clap.workspace = true
colored = "2"
comfy-table = "7"
csv = "1"
orbit-common = { path = "../orbit-common" }
orbit-core = { path = "../orbit-core", features = ["clap"] }
orbit-knowledge = { path = "../orbit-knowledge" }
orbit-mcp = { path = "../orbit-mcp" }
regex.workspace = true
serde.workspace = true
serde_json.workspace = true
serde_yaml.workspace = true
tokio.workspace = true
toml.workspace = true

[dev-dependencies]
assert_cmd = "2"
predicates = "3"
serde_json.workspace = true
serde_yaml.workspace = true
tempfile = "3"
toml.workspace = true

[workspace]
members = [
  "crates/orbit-agent",
  "crates/orbit-cli",
  "crates/orbit-common",
  "crates/orbit-core",
  "crates/orbit-engine",
  "crates/orbit-knowledge",
  "crates/orbit-store",
  "crates/orbit-policy",
  "crates/orbit-exec",
  "crates/orbit-tools",
  "crates/orbit-mcp",
]
resolver = "2"

[workspace.package]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT"

[workspace.dependencies]
axum = { version = "0.7", default-features = false, features = ["http1", "json", "query", "tokio"] }
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive"] }
fs2 = "0.4"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "signal", "net"] }
jsonschema = { version = "0.18", default-features = false }
libc = "0.2"
rusqlite = { version = "0.31", features = ["bundled", "chrono"] }
reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = ["blocking", "json"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
regex = "1"
sha2 = "0.10"
tiktoken-rs = "0.11.0"
thiserror = "2"
toml = "0.8"
tracing = "0.1"
tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter", "fmt"] }
unicode-normalization = "0.1"
wait-timeout = "0.2"
proptest = "1"
